//: Dev defaults assume GPT-2 fixtures live at C:\gpt2\ (gpt2_small.bin + vocab.json + merges.txt). Override OVERFIT_MODEL_DIR or pass explicit --model/--vocab/--merges to retarget.

default.//: Short generation — quickest path to seeing the demo work.

long-generation.//: 128 tokens — better for eyeballing fluency + stable tokens/sec measurement.
long-generation.commandLineArgs: --prompt "In C#, the best way to handle memory is" --tokens 128

kubernetes.//: Reproduces the third example from the README.

custom.//: Skeleton with all knobs — override anything from VS launch settings UI or CLI args.
